entities.name: tar-stream
entities.context: A tool that exposes streams for creating and extracting tarballs.

entities.name: pack
entities.context: A function of tar-stream to create tarballs.

entities.name: extract
entities.context: A function of tar-stream to extract tarballs.

entities.name: modify an existing tarball
entities.context: The process of altering a tarball using tar-stream.

relationships.context: tar-stream uses the pack function to create tarballs.
tar-stream uses the extract function to extract tarballs.
Extract is related to modifying an existing tarball.
Pack is related to modifying an existing tarball.
